top.title: Macron calls Trump's remarks on his marriage 'inelegant'
top.summary: French President Emmanuel Macron has said Donald Trump's comments about his marriage were "neither elegant nor up to standard".

top.title: Man dies in storm as Saharan dust shrouds Crete
top.summary: A man dies in flooding near Athens as rain lashes several regions in Greece, while a Saharan dust storm enveloped Crete.

top.title: Brazil grants joint custody over pets in new law for separated couples
top.summary: Lawmakers in the Brazilian Congress on Tuesday viewed the law change as a reflection on the importance people place on their pets.

top.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to go public in $1 trillion share listing
top.summary: The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

top.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
top.summary: The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".

top.title: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected'
top.summary: Anthropic, the company behind the AI coding assistant, said it was fixing a problem blocking users.
